verses.text: Moses in Israel mihonpi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Hihte pen note' hih ding Topa' hong thupiak ahi hi
Ni guk sungin nasep kiman ding a, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni-in thupi-a tawlngakna Sabbath siangtho Topa' tungah na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem peuhmah kithat ding hi
Sabbath ni-in na ten'na khempeuh uhah mei na cih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Moses in Israel mihonpite khempeuh tungah, “ Topa' hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi
Note in Topa' tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. A pia nuam peuhmah in Topa' tungah biakna paipih un. Tuate in: Kham, ngun leh sumngo
a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk puan hoihte, keelmul
a kisansak tuutal vunte leh savunte; singkha sing
meivak-a' ding sathau, nilh sathau leh a paknamtui dingin a namtui nate
siampipuan leh awmdalah bulh dingin onik suang leh suang dangte ahi hi.
“Note' lak panin siamna a nei mi peuhmah hong paisak un la, Topa' thupiaksa khempeuh bawlsak un. Tua a bawl dingte pen biakbuk
a puanbuk leh a khuhna, a vankhainate leh a khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, a bullente
singkuang a zawlte tawh, hehpihna tokhom leh kongkhak dalna puan
sabuai a zawlte leh a nazatte khempeuh tawh, Ompihna Anlum
khuavak dingin meivakkhuam zong, a nazatte leh a meivakte tawh, meivak dingin sathau
paknamtui biakna tau, a zawlte tawh, nilh sathau leh a namtui paknamtui leh biakbuk kongah kongkhak-a' ding puankhai
meihal biakna tau, a sumngo siklen, a zawlte, a nazatte khempeuh, kuang leh a ngakna tawh
buktual-a a puankhaite, a khuampite leh a bullente tawh, tual kongpi-a' ding puankhai
biakbuk khetphimte leh huang khetphimte, leh a khaute
siangtho munah zat dingin limtakin a kigan puante, amau' siampi nasepna dingin siampi Aaron-a' ding puan siangtho leh ama tapate' puante ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Israel mihonpi khempeuh Moses' omna panin paikhia uh hi
Piak nopna lungsim a nei mi peuhmah hong pai tawm uh a, kikhopna buk leh a nasepna ding khempeuh leh puan siangthote-a zat dingin Topa-a' ding a piakte uh hong puak uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin numei, pasal hong pai uh hi. Piak nopna lungsim a neite khempeuh in tukkilhte, bilbahte, min gelhna zungbuhte, leh banbulhte ahi kham tawh a kibawl na namkim hong paipih uh a, a milip in Topa' tungah kham tawh piakna ap uh hi
A dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute, puan hoih, keelmul, a kisansak tuutal vunte, ahih kei leh savun hoihte ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah in tuate hong paipih uh hi
Ngun ahi a, sumngo ahi zongin a pia thei peuhmah in Topa' tungah tua nate paipih uh a, nasepna dinga kimang thei ding singkha sing a nei mi peuhmah in zong hong paipih hi
A hih thei numei khempeuh in a khut uh tawh khau khuk uh a, amau' khuksa a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk khaute hong paipih uh hi
Hih theih siamna a nei numei khempeuh in zong keelmul khuk uh hi
Makaite in siampipuan leh awmdal-a bulh dingin onik suang leh suang dangte
meivak ding, nilh sathau ding, leh paknamtui dingin a namtui nate leh sathau hong paipih uh hi
Topa in Moses tunga a thupiaksa nasepna dingin na khat peuhpeuh a pia nuam numei pasal Israel mi khempeuh in utthu-a biakna-in Topa' tungah hong paipih uh hi.
Moses in Israel mite kiangah, “Thei un; Topa in a minin Judah minam, Hur' tapa Uri, Uri' tapa Bezalel sam khin hi

Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuh nasepna ding, bulh ding suang seekna, leh singzep nasep a sem dingin amah in vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna, leh khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah kidimsak hi
Topa in amah leh Dan minam Ahisamak' tapa Oholiab tungah midangte hilh siamna pia khin hi

Amah in khutsiam nasep, geelsiam nasep; a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk puanzep siam nasep; siamgat siamna, leh geelsiam nasep ahi zongin nasep namkim a sem dingin amaute tungah siamna a guan' hi.
